description_long: This is a rectangular vending machine with a prominent red and black color scheme and the Nescafé brand displayed on a large illuminated sign at the top. The front features a transparent glass panel revealing several rows of assorted products, likely beverages or snacks, organized on shelves. To the right of the glass panel is a vertical control area with a keypad, product selection buttons, and a payment interface. The sides of the machine are solid black with large red Nescafé branding and the phrase 'Open up' in white script. The back is plain black with no visible features. The machine stands on four short metallic legs and has a robust, metallic construction typical of urban vending machines.
description: A red and black Nescafé vending machine with a glass front displaying products, a keypad and payment area, and bold branding on the sides and top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass display with products, keypad, payment interface, and the illuminated Nescafé sign.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the large red Nescafé branding and 'Open up' slogan on a black background.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black surface with no visible features or branding.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the same Nescafé branding and slogan.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular illuminated display panel at the top front, showing the Nescafé logo in white on a red background.
attribute_payment_interface: A vertical payment interface on the right front, including a keypad, coin slot, and possibly a bill acceptor, all grouped together in a rectangular section.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A set of individual rectangular buttons arranged vertically next to the keypad on the right front, each likely corresponding to a product row.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular retrieval slot at the lower right front, beneath the keypad and payment area, with a metallic flap.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large illuminated Nescafé sign at the top front, and red Nescafé branding with 'Open up' slogan on both side panels.
